overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world western game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking steadily through a rolling grassy hillside landscape. The scene features scattered pine trees, large rock formations, and distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside trail with scattered pine trees and rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along a grassy wilderness trail, carrying a rifle on the back, moving away from a large rock formation toward open hills

entered.detail: massive gray boulder formation situated on the left side of the trail, partially covered in moss
tall evergreen pine trees dotting the hillside, casting long shadows in the golden light
rolling terrain covered in tall green grass with a faint dirt path winding through it
hazy blue-gray mountains visible on the horizon beneath the cloud layer
fluffy white clouds scattered across the blue sky, creating dynamic lighting patterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through an open grassland prairie during golden hour, with warm sunlight illuminating the tall grass. A large rock outcrop recedes into the background on the left as the character progresses along the faint trail, while scattered pine trees and distant mountains frame the expansive wilderness landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive grassland prairie bathed in the warm glow of golden hour. It begins with the character walking steadily along a faint trail, where the low sunlight illuminates the swaying tall grass. As the character progresses, a large rock outcrop on the left gradually recedes into the background, opening up the view of the wilderness. The scene then expands to reveal scattered pine trees and distant mountains that frame the horizon before the camera continues its steady forward motion through the open landscape.
